name: Lennox Rose
description:
Lennox is a character from Fortnite who inhabits the Battle Royale island. Her description states "The first to escape the Academy... But not the last" likely implying lore-wise that she is an actor/character of the fictional series one of the other inhabitants, Beach Bomber, says she watches.

She appears as a young girl dressed more in a punk aesthetic with a black top and shorts under a white jacket that has spikes lined along the collar and midsection coupled with wearing combat boots and legs belts that come with a gun holster. Her hair is blonde with pink streaks which is tied in twin ponytails.
creator: AnimeMan1993
